title: The Navigator

evidence.note: Published 1924; the 95-year US copyright term has expired for works published through 1930, so the film print is public domain in the US by term expiry.

watch.label: Internet Archive — The Navigator (1924), full film

editorial: The Navigator is a 1924 American silent comedy directed by Donald Crisp and Buster Keaton and starring Keaton for Metro-Goldwyn, stranding two pampered innocents alone aboard a drifting ocean liner; it was among Keaton's biggest commercial hits. Published in 1924, the film print's US copyright term has expired, placing the photoplay in the public domain by term expiry. Later restorations may carry their own separate rights.
